title: dryopteris parallelogramma
intro: Dryopteris parallelogramma, also known as the shield fern, is a species of fern native to China and other parts of Asia. It is believed to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to alleviate symptoms of fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. In traditional Chinese medicine, the shield fern is often prepared as an infusion, tea, or powder, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
